flashcards.definition: Formation of oocytes; begins prenatally, arrested at prophase I; resumes at puberty with each cycle.
Release of a secondary oocyte from the ovary at mid-cycle (~day 14), triggered by LH surge.
Structure formed from the ruptured follicle post-ovulation; secretes progesterone and estrogen.
Inner lining of the uterus; thickens each cycle for implantation; sheds during menstruation.
Primary female hormone; promotes endometrial growth, secondary sex characteristics, and bone density.
